title: Nyla Hears the Animals
synopsis: Baby Nyla discovers the wonderful sounds animals make as she visits different places with her family. From dogs that say 'woof' to cats that say 'meow,' each page introduces a new animal sound in a gentle, repetitive pattern perfect for very young children.

illustration.description: A smiling toddler girl with warm brown skin and curly black hair in small pigtails sits in a sunny park. She has bright, curious eyes and wears a soft yellow dress. Her hands are cupped around her ears in a listening pose. The background shows gentle green trees and a blue sky with puffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Nyla listening with hands cupped to ears in a park

illustration.description: A friendly golden retriever with a big smile and tongue hanging out stands next to Nyla on soft green grass. The dog's tail is wagging with motion lines. Nyla claps her hands with delight, her face beaming with joy. Warm afternoon sunlight creates soft shadows, and there are small daisies scattered in the grass.
illustration.alt: Happy golden dog saying woof next to clapping Nyla

illustration.description: A fluffy orange tabby cat sits on a garden fence, mouth open mid-meow. Nyla reaches up toward the cat with both arms, giggling. The fence is painted white with climbing pink roses. The cat has bright green eyes and whiskers that catch the light. Soft pastel colors create a dreamy garden atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Orange cat meowing on fence while Nyla reaches up

illustration.description: A small blue bird with a yellow belly perches on a low tree branch, beak open in song. Nyla points up at the bird with one finger, her mouth forming a small 'o' of wonder. The tree has soft green leaves that filter dappled sunlight. Small musical notes float in the air around the bird.
illustration.alt: Blue bird tweeting on branch with Nyla pointing up

illustration.description: A gentle black and white dairy cow stands behind a wooden fence in a grassy field. The cow's head is lowered toward Nyla, who stands safely on the other side of the fence. Rolling green hills stretch in the background under a pale blue sky. The cow has kind, dark eyes and pink nostrils.
illustration.alt: Friendly cow saying moo to Nyla at farm fence

illustration.description: A yellow duck with an orange bill waddles near a small blue pond. Nyla sits cross-legged on the grass nearby, watching with wide eyes. Lily pads float on the water's surface, and cattails grow along the pond's edge. Gentle ripples spread across the water where the duck has been swimming.
illustration.alt: Yellow duck quacking by pond with sitting Nyla watching

illustration.description: A fluffy white sheep with a black face stands in a meadow of wildflowers. Nyla walks toward the sheep with her arms outstretched, smiling brightly. Purple and yellow wildflowers dot the green grass. The sheep's wool looks soft and cloud-like against the pastoral setting.
illustration.alt: Woolly sheep saying baa in flower meadow with approaching Nyla

illustration.description: Nyla sits in the center surrounded by all the animals in a dreamy circular arrangement - the dog, cat, bird, cow, duck, and sheep. She claps her hands joyfully with the biggest smile. Sound words 'WOOF,' 'MEOW,' 'TWEET,' 'MOO,' 'QUACK,' and 'BAA' float in colorful bubbles around them all in a magical, celebratory scene.
illustration.alt: Nyla surrounded by all animals with sound words floating around

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the dog make?
questions.explanation: Dogs say WOOF! That's the barking sound they make.

questions.question: What animal says MOO?
questions.explanation: Cows say MOO! It's the sound they make on the farm.

questions.question: What does Nyla do when she hears the animals?
questions.explanation: Nyla loves hearing the animal sounds! She listens carefully and smiles with joy.
